Title: Devotions
Author: Mary Oliver
Notes: The collection I return to most. 'The Summer Day' changed my life.

Title: Wade in the Water
Author: Tracy K. Smith
Notes: 'An Old Story' wrecked me. US Poet Laureate for a reason.

Title: Night Sky with Exit Wounds
Author: Ocean Vuong
Notes: Every line is a wound and a gift. I've read it 4 times.

Title: The Carrying
Author: Ada Limon
Notes: 'The Conditional' is the poem I wish I'd written.

Title: Citizen: An American Lyric
Author: Claudia Rankine
Notes: Required reading for being alive in America.

Title: When Breath Becomes Air
Author: Paul Kalanithi
Notes: Neurosurgeon facing mortality. Cried on the bus reading this.

Title: The Immortal Life of Henrietta Lacks
Author: Rebecca Skloot
Notes: Ethics, race, science. Perfect intersection of everything I care about.

Title: Mountains Beyond Mountains
Author: Tracy Kidder
Notes: Paul Farmer's story. This is the kind of doctor I want to be.

Title: Being Mortal
Author: Atul Gawande
Notes: Changed how I think about end-of-life care.

Title: Such a Fun Age
Author: Kiley Reid
Notes: Anna recommended. Quick read, sharp on race and class.

Title: Postcolonial Love Poem
Author: Natalie Diaz
Notes: Halfway through. Indigenous queer voice, stunning imagery.

Title: The House of the Spirits
Author: Isabel Allende
Notes: Faith recommended, reading together. Magical realism.

Title: My Own Country
Author: Abraham Verghese
Notes: Doctor memoir about AIDS epidemic in rural Tennessee.

Title: The Spirit Catches You and You Fall Down
Author: Anne Fadiman
Notes: Cultural competency in medicine. Prof. Okonkwo assigned it.

Title: Just Medicine
Author: Dayna Bowen Matthew
Notes: Implicit bias in healthcare. For personal statement research.
